use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and modals
Secondary action buttons in sheet/drawer panels
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and navigation
Destructive action triggers with visual warning states
Interactive elements in overlay components like sheets
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic rendering and class-variance-authority for type-safe styling. Features ring-based focus states and disabled states, commonly used as interactive triggers within sheet/drawer overlay patterns on SaaS platforms.
